name: Mocha-Chip Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine graham cracker crumbs, butter and 1 cup of the mini-chocolate chips; mix well. Pat into a 9-inch springform pan, covering the bottom and up to 2-1/2 inches on the sides; set aside.
2. In a saucepan, combine milk and coffee; sprinkle gelatin on top. Set aside for 1 minute. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until gelatin and coffee dissolve. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until creamy. Beat in sweetened condensed milk (NOT evaporated milk) and gelatin mixture. Fold in the remaining mini-chocolate chips and whipped cream; pour into prepared pan. Chill; remove rim.
